titleStmt.title: SII 18.91: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 91. (B.K. No. 147 of 1933-34.) BIJĀPUR, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva is dated in the Chālukya-Vikrama year 8, Rudhirōdgāri, Pushya, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti, corresponding to A.D. 1083, December 24, Sunday. The Saṁkramaṇa commenced at 6-8 on that day.

It states that when Mahāmaṇḍalēs11vara Bhīvaṇarasa was governing Tarddavāḍi One-thousand, Daṇḍanāyaka Dāsimarasa, the suṅkavergaḍe of the perjunka and vaḍḍarāvuḷa taxes of Tarddavāḍi One-thousand made a grant of income derived from the pannāya and perjuṅka taxes. The gift was made for the worship of god Sakaḷēs11vara at Sirimalage and for the maintenance of the priest (pūjāri) and other attendants. The dedication by a certain Rebbakabbe of her servant Māchabbe to the temple is also recorded. Manevergaḍe Guṇḍamayya is mentioned.
After the imprecatory verse, is engraved in late characters, a grant of certain taxes.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēsva
ra paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrī matribhuvanama
lladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācandrārkatāraṁbaraṁ
saluttamire rājadhāni kalyāṇapurada nelevīḍinoḷ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ
geyyattamire tatpādapadmōpajīvigaḷappa samadhigatapañcamahāśabda mahāsāma ntādhipati ma
hāpracaṇḍadaṇḍanāyakaṁ maneverggaḍe guṇḍamayyaṁgaḷ svasti śrīmanmahāma
ṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ bhīvaṇadēvaru tarddavāḍi sāsiramaṁ tribhōgābhyantarasiddhiyināḷutta miralu tarddha
vāḍi sāsirada perjjuṁkada vaḍḍarāvuḷada suṁkaverggaḍe śrī maddaṇḍanāyakandāsi
marasarumiḻdu svasti śrī cāḷukyavikramavarṣa 8 neya rudhirōdgārisaṁvatsarada pu
ṣya suddha 13 Ādivāradandinuttarāyaṇasaṁkrānti parvvanimittadandu sirimalageya to
ṟeya taḍiya sakaḷēsvaradēvargge snāna nivēdya gandha dhūpa nandādīvige jīrṇnōddhāra pūjā
ri sāravaṇeyavarumintinitarkke paṁnnāyadaluṁ perjjuṁkadaluṁ kūḍi samudāyadalu tiṁ
gaḷige Ondu Eleya pēṟina suṁkamanācandrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ biṭṭaru . Ī dharmma vanārōrvvaru
taṁtamma kāladoḷnaḍeyisuvaravaradē dharmmaviṣēsa mattaṁ vāraṇāsiyoḷaṁ kuru
kṣētradoḷaṁ prayāgeyoḷaṁ sāsira kavileyaṁ sāsira brāhmaṇarige koṭṭa phaḷa
makku I dharmmamanārōrvvaru naḍeyisade kiḍisidavaṁge sāsira kavileyumaṁ
sāsira brāhmaṇarumaṁ vāraṇāsiyoḷaḷida dōśamakku . Ī dharmmakkilli naḍeva
suṁki gare Oḍeyarāgi dēvargge bhaktarapparane pūjāri māḍi duṣṭaniThe letter ki is engraved below the line.
graha śiṣṭapratipāḷaneyiṁ naḍasuvadu Upēkṣisidarappa
ḍavargge dōśamakku . Ā kāladoḷ rebbakabbe tanna tottu mācabbeya sakaḷēśvara dēvargge biṭṭaḷu .
© ślōka . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēdvasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣasahaśrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jā
yatē krimiḥ . hecisenuḻi Āderasināyavū nākeneya voṁduThe following portion seems to be a later addition.
hoṁge hāga caitradalu hāga
pavitradalu hāga saṁkrāṁtiyalu bēḷe dīpāvaḷi
yalu bēḷe
Digital edition of SII 18.91 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
